outcomes.name: preserves
outcomes.summary: The transformation preserves the structure under the criteria being evaluated.

outcomes.name: breaks
outcomes.summary: The transformation breaks the structure under the criteria being evaluated.

outcomes.name: inherits
outcomes.summary: A derived structure inherits selected structure from the source.

outcomes.name: ignores
outcomes.summary: The transformation is not structurally relevant under the criteria being evaluated.

outcomes.name: mixed
outcomes.summary: The transformation has partial, conditional, or mixed structural effects.

outcomes.name: unknown
outcomes.summary: The structural effect is unresolved or intentionally unspecified.
